utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections with entries. Now check if each is fully specified:
- property: includes selected property with details and price (yes: name, price, details). However, lacks confirmation it’s a condo in Toronto and sourced from saved searches/agents; but format only requires selected property with details and price, so it is sufficiently specified.
- financing: requires financing solution with terms (yes: solution, down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate range, amortization, arrangement fee). Terms are present though some are ranges/typical; still qualifies as terms.
- legal_services: legal services with costs (yes: package and cost).
- moving_services: moving arrangements with costs (yes: service and cost).
- setup_services: utility and setup services (yes: utility setup fee and estimated monthly utilities).
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (yes: breakdown line items and totals). Therefore, all 6 items are included and sufficiently specified per the format.
